Documentation.short_help: Modify boundary radial/normal/variable fields and block names on an existing partitioned collection.
Documentation.long_help: Accepts vtkPartitionedDataSetCollection (e.g. from SHYX DataSet To Partitioned Collection). For each side set: optionally computes BoundaryRadialValue = 1 - x^a, writes BoundaryRadialValueNormal and BoundaryVariable* point/cell arrays (overwriting same-named arrays), mirrors point data onto paired node sets, and optionally accumulates normals / variables onto the tetrahedra element block. Block names and vtkDataAssembly labels can be edited in the Partitioned block names panel.

IntVectorProperty.name: ComputeBoundaryRadialValue
IntVectorProperty.label: Compute Boundary Radial Value
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled, compute BoundaryRadialValue = 1 - x^a on side and node set blocks, and BoundaryRadialValueNormal uses BoundaryRadialValue * sideNormal. When disabled, BoundaryRadialValue is not computed, and BoundaryRadialValueNormal uses sideNormal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: BoundaryRadialNormalFalloffFactor
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Boundary Radial Normal Falloff Factor (a)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Exponent a in BoundaryRadialValue = 1 - x^a, where x is the raw radial coordinate.

StringVectorProperty.name: BlockNames
StringVectorProperty.label: Block Names

StringVectorProperty.name: BoundaryVariables
StringVectorProperty.label: Boundary Variables
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Newline-separated rows aligned with the Partitioned block names panel order; values in each row are tab-separated Variable1, Variable2, ... entries. Side set rows are used by the filter, and node set rows mirror the corresponding side row in the widget. Finite values are written to tetrahedra point-data scalars BoundaryVariable1, BoundaryVariable2, ... (initialized to NaN; empty / NaN cells are not written). Repeated writes to the same volume node are warned and averaged.

StringVectorProperty.name: BoundaryWriteNormals
StringVectorProperty.label: Boundary Write Normals
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Newline-separated 0/1 flags aligned with the Partitioned block names panel order. Only side set rows are used. When non-zero, that side's BoundaryRadialValueNormal is accumulated onto tetrahedra volume points (independent of BoundaryVariables). Repeated writes to the same volume node are warned and averaged.
